usefulness_evaluation.narrative: This is a structural/adversarial test persona that does not evaluate AI usefulness. All 10 edge case tests passed: validation interceptor correctly catches malformed UUIDs (INVALID_ARGUMENT), empty/oversized fields, and empty booking text; GetTrip returns NOT_FOUND for non-existent UUIDs; trip status transitions are properly enforced (COMPLETED to PLANNING rejected with failed_precondition); DeleteBooking is idempotent (silent success on non-existent ID); ListTrips returns a valid response with trips array. The buf.validate constraints are comprehensive and well-configured across all tested proto definitions.

test_results.actual: INVALID_ARGUMENT: validation error: id: value must be a valid UUID
test_results.notes: buf.validate UUID constraint correctly enforced by validation interceptor

test_results.actual: INVALID_ARGUMENT: validation error: title: value length must be at least 1 characters
INVALID_ARGUMENT: validation error: title: value length must be at most 512 characters
test_results.notes: Maximum length constraint enforced at 512 chars

test_results.actual: FAILED_PRECONDITION: invalid trip status transition: completed -> planning
test_results.notes: State machine is properly enforced. Backend correctly rejects COMPLETED to PLANNING transition. Note: PLANNING to COMPLETED was allowed (skipping ACTIVE), which is reasonable for trips that never start.

test_results.actual: INVALID_ARGUMENT: validation error: content: value length must be at least 1 characters
test_results.notes: Empty message correctly rejected before reaching AI

test_results.actual: INVALID_ARGUMENT: validation error: content: value length must be at most 10000 characters
test_results.notes: 10000 char limit enforced by buf.validate constraint
Idempotent delete behavior. No error, no panic, no 500. Acceptable pattern.

test_results.actual: INVALID_ARGUMENT: validation error: raw_text: value length must be at least 1 characters

test_results.description: ListTrips returns valid response (not error for collection)
test_results.actual: Success with trips array and pagination metadata
test_results.notes: Returns proper {trips: [...], pagination: {totalCount: N}} structure. Does not incorrectly return NOT_FOUND for the collection.
